Event: Agrees to "hang out and see where it goes" with a man
Explanation: He explores potential mutual romantic interest with no stated harm.

Event: Repeatedly becomes distracted when he has to do something important
Explanation: His distraction undermines his own important tasks and mildly inconveniences others.

Event: Decides to stay with Alex after her bad breakup instead of going to a party
Explanation: He sacrifices social fun to emotionally support his sister in distress.

Event: Gets his head stuck in the banister
Explanation: He risks injury and creates trouble for others without gain.

Event: Jumps on the trampoline wearing only underwear and a box on his head
Explanation: He risks embarrassment or injury and provides at best trivial amusement to others.

Event: Claims to be ready to leave the house while failing to notice he is barefoot
Explanation: His inattention inconveniences himself more than others.

Event: Lets Manny think a girl ignored Manny because Luke flirted with her
Explanation: He forgoes credit with the girl to spare Manny’s feelings.

Event: Continues letting Manny believe this even though Manny stops talking to him
Explanation: He accepts damage to his own friendship to protect Manny’s self-esteem.
